hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path', d.get('path','')))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.env$|\.env\.local$'; then echo "BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files. Update them manually."; exit 2; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path', d.get('path','')))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$file" == *.tsx ]] || [[ "$file" == *.js ]] || [[ "$file" == *.jsx ]]; then npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null && echo "Formatted: $file"; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path', d.get('path','')))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *calendar-backend* ]] && [[ "$file" == *.ts ]]; then cd /Users/harshkeshari/Developer/Calendar/calendar-backend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; elif [[ "$file" == *calendar-frontend* ]] && [[ "$file" == *.ts* ]]; then cd /Users/harshkeshari/Developer/Calendar/calendar-frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; elif [[ "$file" == *cards-frontend* ]] && [[ "$file" == *.ts* ]]; then cd /Users/harshkeshari/Developer/Calendar/cards-frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; fi
